button.name: action_auto_create_ar_payment_manual
button.invisible: is_auto_payment_invoice == False or payment_state == 'paid' or move_type != 'out_invoice'

button.name: action_auto_create_ar_payment_qris
button.invisible: is_auto_payment_invoice == False or 'WO' not in payment_reference or payment_state == 'paid' or move_type != 'out_invoice'

button.name: action_auto_create_ar_payment_va
button.invisible: is_auto_payment_invoice == False or payment_state == 'paid' or move_type != 'out_invoice'
